claims.name: Safety-Led Operations
claims.canonical_text: Volcano travel is unpredictable, so JVTO focuses on operational certainty: disciplined decisions, clear safety boundaries, and realistic expectations.

evidence.description: Founder is active Tourist Police officer (Ditpamobvit)
Detik.com independent confirmation of Bripka Agung as active Polpar
Police vehicle support and escort documentation
Safety resource mapping — Tourist Police Pam Obvit + Patwal active support, SPRIN docs, APGI guide certification, Ijen Rijik program, red flag system
Structured safety protocol — SAR procedures, Lamborghini evacuation, risk flag system, Sengkan Gandrung braking zone, Green Briefings, PVMBG 500m exclusion zone

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO focuses on operational certainty for East Java volcano routes: risk-aware planning, safety boundaries, and Plan B alternatives.
narrative.short: Safety-led planning. Clear boundaries. Plan B when conditions change.
narrative.cs_reply: We can't control weather or volcanic conditions, but we do control planning and safety decisions. If conditions change, we use Plan B options to keep your trip safe and worthwhile.

claims.name: Private Tours (Execution Control)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO runs private tours by default so timing, pacing, and safety decisions stay consistent for your group.

evidence.description: All 22 packages are private (dedicated vehicle + crew)

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO is private-tour focused for East Java volcano trips, supporting better time control and consistent execution.
narrative.short: Private tours only. Your own vehicle. Your own pace (within safety limits). No mixed groups by default.
narrative.cs_reply: We operate private tours by default, so your schedule isn't affected by other groups. It helps with timing, comfort, and safer decision-making.

claims.name: All-Inclusive Clarity
claims.canonical_text: JVTO uses an all-inclusive structure by default to reduce surprise costs and mid-trip negotiation.

evidence.description: Written inclusions/exclusions in policy pack v6

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO emphasizes written inclusions/exclusions and centralized policies to reduce uncertainty around pricing and changes.
narrative.short: All-inclusive by default. Clear inclusions. Fewer surprise costs. Transparent pricing, written rules.
narrative.cs_reply: Most costs are bundled so your trip runs smoothly. What's included and excluded is written clearly in your booking reference.

claims.name: Ijen Health-Screening Coordination
claims.canonical_text: On routes that include Mount Ijen, JVTO integrates health screening as a practical safety step, not a formality.

evidence.description: BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024 — regulatory basis for health screening
Dr. Irwandanu SIP — Kemenkes/KKI verifiable medical license
7 Ijen incidents (2015-2026), 4 fatalities — 50% fitness-related (heart attack, exhaustion). Directly validates health screening mandate.

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO includes an Ijen health-screening protocol on itineraries that include Mount Ijen, documented in the Travel Guide.
narrative.short: Ijen routes include a health-screening layer (when required). Real screening, clear rules.
narrative.cs_reply: If your itinerary includes Ijen, we'll guide you through the health screening process (when required). It's a safety step before the hike — not a formality.

claims.name: Proof-First Trust (Verification Layer)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO organizes trust signals as a verification layer: clear claims, context, and evidence links — not just marketing statements.

evidence.description: NIB, TDUP, HPWKI all publicly verifiable with SHA-256 anchors
14-page visual dossier consolidating all 9 claims with verified document exhibits. Customer-facing trust artifact. SHA-256 anchored.

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO uses a proof-library approach: organizing verifiable credentials, partners, and recognition as structured trust signals.
narrative.short: Proof you can verify — licenses, partners, press, and documented references. Trust stack, not slogans.
narrative.cs_reply: If you want to verify us, start at /verify-jvto. It's organized so you can check credentials, partners, and references quickly.

claims.name: Reviews Registry (Independent Validation)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO treats reviews as a registry: grouped by platform and theme, so guests can validate patterns instead of reading random quotes.

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO structures independent reviews by platform and theme to support auditability of guest experience claims.
narrative.short: Reviews as a registry, not a quote wall. Check patterns across platforms.
narrative.cs_reply: You can check reviews by platform and by theme at /why-jvto/reviews. It's organized so you can see patterns, not random quotes.

claims.name: Our Team (Personality Economy + Operational Credibility)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO's product is executed by real people. The Team Registry shows roles, routes, and proof from review mentions — not generic bios.

evidence.description: 14 crew members with KTA credentials and review-linked profiles

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO publishes a team registry that connects staff roles and route expertise to review-based evidence.
narrative.short: Meet the people behind your trip — with proof from reviews. Team profiles linked to real guest language.
narrative.cs_reply: If you want to know who runs the trip, see /why-jvto/our-team. Each profile links to review mentions so you can judge from guest experience.

claims.name: Partners as Context (HPWKI / INDECON / ISIC)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO partnerships are explained by function: competence context (HPWKI), sustainability context (INDECON), and verification logic (ISIC).

evidence.description: HPWKI, INDECON, ISIC partnerships with functional descriptions
BBKSDA-supervised guide training (250 HPWKI guides, SAR + PPGD)

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO describes partnerships as functional trust signals (competence, sustainability context, verification) within the Proof Library.
narrative.short: Partners for context: competence, sustainability, and verification. Not logos — real functions.
narrative.cs_reply: Our partners are listed with context in /verify-jvto. It explains what each partnership means for your trip — not just a logo display.

final_value.isic: JVTO may mention ISIC student verification or student benefit only when the merchant/verification flow is confirmed.
final_value.indecon: Use 'aligned with national ecotourism principles' unless formal INDECON membership proof exists.
final_value.hpi_hpwki: Use HPI/HPWKI credential wording only for individual licensed guides with evidence; do not imply JVTO corporate membership without proof.
final_value.media_logos: Use media logos only as 'As Featured In' references with direct source links, not as partnership or endorsement claims.

claims.name: Press & Recognition (Third-Party Context)
claims.canonical_text: JVTO lists press and recognition with context so guests can evaluate third-party references, not just branding claims.

evidence.description: 4 independent press items + Stefan Loose guidebook + Booking 2015 award

narrative.ai_snippet: JVTO maintains a press-and-recognition registry that links third-party references to specific claims and context.
narrative.short: Press and recognition, explained with context. Third-party references you can evaluate.
narrative.cs_reply: If you want third-party context on JVTO, see the Press & Recognition section in /verify-jvto/press-recognition.

final_value.isic: JVTO may mention ISIC student verification or student benefit only when the merchant/verification flow is confirmed.
final_value.indecon: Use 'aligned with national ecotourism principles' unless formal INDECON membership proof exists.
final_value.hpi_hpwki: Use HPI/HPWKI credential wording only for individual licensed guides with evidence; do not imply JVTO corporate membership without proof.
final_value.media_logos: Use media logos only as 'As Featured In' references with direct source links, not as partnership or endorsement claims.
